name: TDD-SUBAGENT-BACKLOG-6
title: feature.json schema is undeclared; tests use legacy nested shape
description: tdd-subagent/feature.json uses a flat schema: name, version, owner (string), tdd_state, summary, surface, deprecation_criterion (flat), updated. Test fixtures in test-tdd-step.py, test-context.py, test-drift-check.py use a different, nested shape with owner as object, contract, status, deprecation as object. The actual schema is undeclared anywhere (no JSON schema, no contract-level statement). Either: declare the canonical feature.json schema in contract feature (or here), and update fixtures and consumer scripts (tdd-context.py) to match. The drift between fixtures and real files masked the deprecation_criterion read bug.
